---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an improvement or new feature
title: ''
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''

---

**Is your feature request related to a problem? Please describe.**
A clear and concise description of the problem. E.g., "When exporting products, I need to..."

**Describe the solution you'd like**
What you want to happen. If this involves an API change, describe the expected request/response format.

**Which area does this affect?**
- [ ] Product sync (PNV)
- [ ] Data enrichment (Metakocka)
- [ ] AI categorization (Gemini)
- [ ] Custom exports (CSV/JSON/XML)
- [ ] Authentication / authorization
- [ ] Other: ___

**Describe alternatives you've considered**
Any alternative solutions or workarounds you've thought about.

**Additional context**
Add any other context, mockups, or examples about the feature request here.
